## Source: amazon-inspector (aac057221646f5043eab6606ba990a3a112afc149c583347e40321643deab7ba)
The package bfx-hf-strategy-perf was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (4db2d68b59a3e893535f6b9163042c33e8f236cb4b6df4132493042b7afdf0df)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bfx-hf-strategy-perf' @ 1000.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
